tasks.title: Build daily crypto indicators telegram digest
tasks.description: Fetch Altcoin Season Index and Fear & Greed Index daily at 06:00 local timezone with DST support, format a summary, and send it to a configured Telegram chat thread from an Ubuntu VPS deployment.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: implement a scheduled digest pipeline with source adapters, Telegram delivery, configuration, tests, and Ubuntu VPS setup docs.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: building a Python CLI for daily crypto indicator digests with Telegram delivery, timezone-aware configuration, parsing adapters, and test coverage.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q passed (3 passed). CLI help and live source parsing both succeeded; README and workflow docs updated for Ubuntu VPS + DST-aware cron.

tasks.title: Add CoinGlass bull market peak signals index
tasks.description: Add a new CoinGlass-based market index to the Telegram digest that reports Hit, Average Progress, and one allocation metric from the bull market peak signals page (Hold % or Sell %), with parsing and tests.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Planned: add CoinGlass bull market peak signals metrics to the digest, including Hit, Average Progress, and Hold % or Sell % based on what is reliably available from the page payload.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: implementing CoinGlass bull market peak signals source, digest formatting for multi-metric output, and parser tests for Hit, Average Progress, and one allocation metric from the source payload.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q passed (4 passed). Confirmed the live CoinGlass fetcher returns Hit, Average Progress, and Hold values from the rendered page.

commit.message: ✨ T-002 Add CoinGlass peak signals index

tasks.title: Add manual daily indicator overrides
tasks.description: Let the digest use manually supplied daily indicator values when an upstream source such as CoinGlass cannot be fetched automatically, so today’s report can still be generated with explicit fallback inputs.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Planned: add a manual override path for daily indicator values, with special handling for CoinGlass fetch failures so the digest can be generated from provided numbers when automation is unavailable.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: implementing manual daily indicator overrides via CLI-provided JSON so the digest can fall back to user-supplied values for unavailable sources, especially CoinGlass.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q passed (6 passed). Reviewed the manual override flow, confirmed partial overrides skip only the specified source, and verified README plus workflow docs were updated.
